description: Style Note Crank up your style as the cricket craze kicks off this summer with this Punjab Kings T-shirt for men from reebok. There's no better way of saying 'Go Kings!' than with this T-shirt!Product Details Red T-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves, Reebok branding on right chest and Punjab Kings logo on left chestMaterial and Care PolyesterMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/logoDry in shadeWarm ironSize and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18â &euro ï†ï†�) is wearing a size M
